content: matugen (Rust, matugen-bin 4.1.0 in this repo) generates Material You colors from a wallpaper and renders them into arbitrary templates (TOML config maps template -> input_path/output_path/post_hook). It is the de facto standard dynamic-theming engine in the 2025/2026 Hyprland rice ecosystem (used by Omarchy, end-4/dots-hyprland, HyDE, Caelestia, ML4W). Alternatives (pywal, wpgtk) are legacy/less maintained for Wayland.
